TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Butch_Booker, title = Butch_Booker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Butch_Booker} }

S.FORM: Butch Booker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Butch Booker, squliq na p'unro. raral ga,Butch Booker praw sinsiy maki Cheyney hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Butch Booker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Butch Booker, squliq na p'unro. raral ga,Butch Booker praw sinsiy maki Cheyney hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
